intro: Caralluma albocastanea is a succulent plant species belonging to the Asclepiadaceae family, native to the dry forests of India and Sri Lanka. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, which include weight loss, improved glucose metabolism, and enhanced cognitive function, making it a popular ingredient in natural weight loss supplements. The bioactive constituents of Caralluma albocastanea include alkaloids, flavonoids, and glycosides, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
